body_original: Spent the whole night fixing a bug and it broke again. This is exhausting.
I feel completely drained. I don't even have energy to think anymore.
I'm constantly anxious about production issues. One mistake and everything goes down.
I think I'm burning out. I don't enjoy coding anymore and every task feels like a burden.
I've been working 12+ hours every day this week. I can't keep up with everything.
Another impossible deadline. We just push code and pray nothing breaks.
